Catalyst Grants

Wilding Foundation and SSNAP team up for new grants program

2024

The Foundation announces its partnership with the Salt Spring National Art Prize to launch the Catalyst Grants, committing $100,000 per year for two years to support visual artists.

Read original article ← All news
